articles.title: TikTok and YouTube 'not safe enough' for kids, says regulator
articles.description: YouTube said it worked with experts to provide appropriate experiences. TikTok said it was disappointed Ofcom had not acknowledged its safety features.

articles.title: Free bus trips for children in England this August as part of Reeves's cost-of-living plan
articles.description: Chancellor Rachel Reeves is to reveal a £100m fare-free bus scheme designed to relieve cost-of-living pressures.

articles.title: Chris Mason: Reeves' summer savings drive won't stretch to energy bills
articles.description: The chancellor is announcing measures aimed at easing the cost of living - but no help yet with energy bills.

articles.title: Wes Streeting pledges wealth tax as part of leadership pitch
articles.description: He proposes equalising capital gains tax with income tax, in a reform he estimates could raise £12bn a year.
